evals.prompt: I've been adding MCP servers and agent definitions in VS Code but they don't show up when I use the Copilot CLI. I also have skills in both ~/.copilot/skills and ~/.agents/skills that aren't in sync. Can you sync everything across both tools? Do a dry run first so I can see what would change.
evals.expected_output: The sync script runs with --dry-run showing planned changes for MCP servers, agents, and skills. Output shows which servers would be added/updated, which .agent.md files would be copied, and which skill directories would be synced.
expectations: The assistant runs sync.py (not sync_mcp.py) with --dry-run flag
The output shows an MCP Servers section with planned changes
The output shows an Agents section with planned changes
The output shows a Skills section with planned changes
The assistant explains the dry-run results to the user before applying changes

evals.prompt: I only want to sync my agent definitions from VS Code to the CLI. I don't need MCP servers or skills synced right now. Show me what would happen first.
evals.expected_output: The sync script runs with --resource-type agents and --dry-run, showing only agent file sync plans. No MCP server or skill changes are shown.
expectations: The assistant uses --resource-type agents (or -r agents) flag
The output does NOT include MCP server sync information
The output does NOT include skills sync information
The output shows .agent.md files that would be copied between VS Code prompts and CLI agents directory

evals.prompt: Sync my skills between the .copilot and .agents directories. Go ahead and apply the changes, no need for a preview.
evals.expected_output: The sync script runs with --resource-type skills without --dry-run, actually copying skill directories between ~/.copilot/skills/ and ~/.agents/skills/. The assistant confirms what was synced.
expectations: The assistant does NOT use --dry-run flag (user said to apply changes)
The script runs against the actual skill directories
The output confirms which skills were copied and in which direction
